audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L425 (`if (auctionStart == 0 || elapsedTime > assetParams.auctionDuration) revert InvalidAuction`) directly encodes both conditions of the property assertion. Since `s_auctionStarts` is only ever assigned `block.timestamp` (L353), elapsed time cannot underflow; and `auctionDuration == 0` is rejected at configuration time (L647-648), so the check is sufficient on all reachable paths.
